---
title: "Gary S. Collins, PhD"
subtitle: |
  125th Anniversary Chair \ 
  Professor of Medical Statistics \
  Department of Applied Health Sciences \
  University of Birmingham \
  Email: g.s.collins@bham.ac.uk
description-meta: "Gary Collins is a medical statistician, researcher, and teacher. He is a Professor of Medical Statistics at the University of Birmimgham. His research interests are primarily focused on methodological aspects in the development and fair evaluation of clinical prediction models (including machine learning)."
image: "files/images/Gary_COLLINS_Headshot.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - text: UoB research page  # use image logo
      href: https://research.birmingham.ac.uk/en/persons/gary-collins/
      target: _blank     
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gscollins1973
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/GSCollins
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gary-collins-4101a443/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2772-2316
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
      href: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/A-2258-20143  
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57944334400
      target: _blank
    - text: "![](/files/images/dimensions-logo.jpeg){width=15} Dimensions"  # use customize image or logo
      href: https://app.dimensions.ai/details/entities/publication/author/ur.013573776475.50
      target: _blank      
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?hl=en&user=cVKF81gAAAAJ
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}
# **Welcome!**

I am a [125th Anniversary Chair](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/research/125th-anniversary-fellows-and-chairs) and Professor of Medical Statistics in the [Department of Applied Health Sciences](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/about/college-of-medicine-and-health/applied-health-sciences) at the [University of Birmingham](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/). In 2024, I was awarded a [NIHR Senior Investigator](https://www.nihr.ac.uk/people/professor-gary-collins) award. I previously worked at the University of Oxford for 19 years, where I was a Professor of Medical Statistics and Director of the Centre for Statistics in Medicine.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# **My research interests include**

-   methodology for clinical prediction models (incl. predictive AI/machine learning for healthcare)

-   methodology for evaluation and fairness assessment of clinical prediction models

-   reporting standards and guidelines

-   research transparency

-   meta-science

-   open science
:::
